title: Star Wars Launches New Era With 'The Ninth Jedi' Anime Series in August

captions.instagram: What if a blue lightsaber didn't make you a Jedi? A new Star Wars anime series is breaking the franchise's oldest rule. The Ninth Jedi arrives in August 2026. #StarWars #TheNinthJedi #StarWarsVisions #Anime #DisneyPlus #Hulu #Lightsaber #Jedi #NewSeries #SciFi
captions.facebook: The next Star Wars series throws out the rulebook. In 'The Ninth Jedi,' lightsabers change color based on the user's heart, blurring the line between Jedi and Sith. Are you ready for a Star Wars story that questions everything?

pinterest.title: Star Wars' New Anime Breaks The Lightsaber Rule
pinterest.description: Forget everything you know about lightsabers. In 'Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi,' the color of your blade isn't fixed—it shifts with your connection to the Force. This means a blue saber doesn't guarantee a Jedi, and a red one doesn't confirm a Sith. The series follows Lah Kara on a quest to rebuild the Jedi Order, facing a masked villain named Nawaam. As the first full-length series from the 'Visions' anthology, it operates outside main Star Wars canon, allowing for a bold exploration of the gray area between light and dark. Premieres August 5, 2026, on Disney+ and Hulu.

youtube.title: Star Wars' New Anime BREAKS The Lightsaber Rule #Shorts
youtube.description:
What if a blue lightsaber didn't make you a Jedi? Star Wars is breaking its oldest rule with a new anime series, 'The Ninth Jedi.' In this world, lightsabers change color instantly based on the wielder's heart. Red doesn't mean Sith. Blue doesn't mean Jedi. The series follows Lah Kara's quest to rebuild the Jedi Order. It's the first full series from the 'Star Wars: Visions' anthology, so it's not main canon—giving creators the freedom to explore the gray area between the light and dark sides of the Force. Premieres August 5, 2026, on Disney+ and Hulu.

#StarWars #TheNinthJedi #StarWarsVisions #Anime #DisneyPlus #Hulu #Lightsaber #Jedi #NewSeries
